title: Automatic exports of tabs to PPT/Slides
excerpt:
Hi. 
At the moment the only export possible of tabs on Monday is to Excels.

posts.author: Yemini (Ariel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

At the moment the only export possible of tabs on Monday is to Excels.

I’d be happy if you can add PPT/slides export possiblity.
In an wonderful automated world i’d love to include as many as Monday elements (E.g. charts) into a pre made powerpoint/slides presentation. in an even more wonderful automated world. It would have allow you to choose a presentation design or even provide AI personalized design.

But let’s start from Mission tab to Slides/PPT.

Thanks.

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I am working on an app that can export board data into a presentation/slides/PPTX. Currently, the app is not available on the marketplace yet, but it is expected to launch at the start of next year.

For more information, check out this post: Export Boards to Presentations (Tables, Charts, Graphs)

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml: @Yemini Board to Presentation is now live on the marketplace

posts.author: Yemini (Ariel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you.

Much appreciated.

בתאריך יום ד׳, 12 במרץ 2025, 22:06, מאת TinyFox Labs via monday Community Forum ‏<notifications@monday.discoursemail.com>:

posts.author: Atul (Atul | cloudvandana apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can use our app Build My Docs - monday.com marketplace which enables you to generate PPTX/PDF from Item Data onto a PPTX template.

You can copy Columns, Images, and subitems table onto the PPT.

The data copied over will follow the font style, design, and positioning of the original PPTX.

Here’s the example template you may use → PPTX Template

Make sure to replace the “Merge Values“ with the exact values for each column, subitem table from the settings section of our app, which is unique to each board.

If you need a demo, feel free to reach out → apps@cloudvandana.com

posts.author: TinyFoxLabs (TinyFox Labs)
posts.cookedHtml:
We created an app called Dashboard to Presentation that helps you turn your dashboard PDFs into presentations. It also lets you use your own presentation template. Save hours of manual copy-pasting from dashboards to slides.

How it works

  • Export your monday.com dashboard as a PDF
  • Upload generated PDF to the app
  • Upload your own presentation template to the app
  • Get a structured presentation, that’s it

Demo: Watch here

Install the app:

or install it via the monday marketplace .
